summary: Manual implementation review approved GH-168 packaged Electron startup repair at head 57c300d760d71792860441bc3ff519528c0eacf0. The diff fixes relative renderer asset loading, uses CommonJS preload output, and adds packaged smoke coverage for blank renderer and missing preload.
reviewed_validation_summary: PR #172 head 57c300d760d71792860441bc3ff519528c0eacf0 passed local `npm run smoke:packaged`, `npm run smoke`, `npm audit --audit-level=high`, `git diff --check`, `loom doctor --target . --json`, `loom verify --target . --json`, `loom fact-chain --target . --json`, `loom suite validate --target . --item GH-168 --json`, and `loom suite carrier validate --target . --item GH-168 --json`. Hosted run 28651840456 passed py-compile, demo-bootstrap, repo-local-cli, and loom-check; loom-pr-merge-gate failed because review artifacts were missing before this update.
follow_ups: Hosted loom-pr-merge-gate must be rerun after this review record is pushed.
Fix Loom build/review record suite CLI JSON consumption outside this App product PR; no repo-local shim was added.

semantic_review_disposition.reason: The implementation is narrowly scoped and has direct smoke coverage: Vite emits relative assets for file:// packaged preview, Electron loads preload.cjs, and packaged smoke fails on empty root, missing preload, missing shell context, or blank screenshot pixels.

consumed_inputs.known_tool_blocker: loom build / review record / spec-review suite CLI JSON consumption blocked locally via tools/loom.py; global suite validate and carrier validate pass
